_doc: Draft input for scripts/recorders/record-unlock-calendar.mjs. Curate events here from the free CryptoRank (https://cryptorank.io/token-unlocks) and Tokenomist (https://tokenomist.ai) pages, verify each against the on-chain vesting contract via a free public RPC, fill the verification block, then run the freezer to produce docs/campaign-E/frozen-calendar-YYYYMMDD.json. Events without verified=true are EXCLUDED from the freeze. See docs/campaign-E/PREREGISTRATION.md section 3.1.

verification.method: TODO: read vesting schedule slot / call releasable()/vestedAmount() at the cliff timestamp
